prompt: A dreamy pastel anime portrait of a delicate young woman shown from the chest up, centered in a soft ethereal composition. She has very long, flowing, wavy pale blush pink hair with luminous highlights, filling most of the frame and blending into the background. Her face is intentionally hidden behind a large centered solid rectangle in muted dusty blush, creating a faceless profile-picture placeholder effect. She wears a frilly, romantic, off-shoulder dress in pale blue, white, and pink with lace trim, ruffles, satin texture, and oversized ribbon bows; exactly 3 prominent bows are visible: 1 large blue bow in her hair on the right side, 1 large pink bow near her left wrist, and 1 pink bow on her right shoulder sleeve. She gently holds a small bouquet close to her chest with both hands; the bouquet contains tiny pastel flowers in light blue, white, and pink, tied with a light blue ribbon. Her hair and outfit are decorated with scattered small blossoms, and the background is filled with floating flowers, petals, tiny hearts, and faint ribbon-like swirls for a soft spring fantasy atmosphere. Use a very light high-key palette, watercolor-like anime rendering, airy linework, glossy hair shine, lace detail, soft shading, clean illustration, vertical smartphone wallpaper composition, ultra-cute shoujo aesthetic, white and blush background, elegant and innocent mood.
